ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number of the incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the incident occurred */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of incident (provoked or unprovoked) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the incident occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "fatal" TEXT /* Outcome of the incident (fatal or non-fatal) */,
  "sexo" TEXT /* Sex of the victim */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity the victim was engaged in */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Water temperature at the time of the incident */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the incident occurred */,
  "witnesses" INTEGER /* Number of witnesses to the incident */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the incident report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the victim was involved in */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "sexo" TEXT /* Sex of the victim */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the victim */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injuries sustained */,
  "medical_treatment" TEXT /* Type of medical treatment received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shark_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shark species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the shark species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shark species */,
  "average_size" TEXT /* Average size of the shark species */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Typical behavior of the shark species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the shark species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the shark species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_sharks" (
  "incident_shark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident-shark record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the shark was involved in */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shark species */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the shark */,
  "estimated_age" TEXT /* Estimated age of the shark */,
  "behavior_during_incident" TEXT /* Behavior of the shark during the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_shark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_sharks_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES shark_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_sharks_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the incident occurred */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location */,
  "water_type" TEXT /* Type of water body */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average water depth at the location */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "incident_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident-location record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "distance_from_shore" REAL /* Distance from the shore where the incident occurred */,
  "nearest_landmark" TEXT /* Nearest landmark to the incident location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (e.g., January, February) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_months" (
  "incident_month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident-month record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month */,
  "average_water_temperature" REAL /* Average water temperature of the month */,
  "average_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Average weather conditions of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_months_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_months_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "fatal" TEXT /* Outcome of the incident (fatal or non-fatal) */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries sustained during the incident */,
  "medical_costs" REAL /* Estimated medical costs incurred */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time for the victim (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_outcomes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shark_habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shark species */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., coral reef, coastal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range of the habitat */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity level of the habitat */,
  "depth_range" TEXT /* Depth range of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shark_habitats_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES shark_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., incident report, investigation report) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
